---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---
```{=html}
<script>window.location.replace("finance.html");</script>
```
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .profile-section {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr;
    min-height: 100vh;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
  }

  .profile-left {
    padding: 20px 48px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.1);
  }

  .profile-img {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 280px;
    aspect-ratio: 3/4;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: top;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }

  .profile-name {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    color: #1a1916;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    line-height: 1.1;
  }

  .profile-meta {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 6px;
    margin-top: 4px;
  }

  .profile-meta span {
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #6b6960;
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  .profile-meta .divider {
    width: 32px;
    height: 1px;
    background: rgba(26,25,22,0.2);
    margin: 8px 0;
  }

   .profile-right {
    padding: 20px 64px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    gap: 32px;
  }

  .profile-eyebrow {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.16em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #a8a59e;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .profile-bio {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    line-height: 1.4;
    color: #1a1916;
    font-weight: 300;
    font-style: italic;
    max-width: 580px;
    border-left: 2px solid #2d4a3e;
    padding-left: 28px;
  }

  .currently-block {
    max-width: 520px;
  }

  .currently-heading {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.16em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #a8a59e;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .currently-item {
    display: flex;
    gap: 20px;
    padding: 14px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.08);
    align-items: baseline;
  }

  .currently-item:first-of-type {
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.08);
  }

  .c-dot {
    width: 5px;
    height: 5px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: #c8b89a;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-top: 8px;
  }

  .c-text {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #6b6960;
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  .c-text strong {
    color: #1a1916;
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .profile-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .profile-link {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #f7f5f1;
    background: #1a1916;
    padding: 11px 24px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
  }

  .profile-link:hover {
    background: #2d4a3e;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: #f7f5f1;
  }

  .profile-link.ghost {
    background: transparent;
    color: #1a1916;
    border: 1px solid rgba(26,25,22,0.2);
  }

  .profile-link.ghost:hover {
    border-color: #1a1916;
    background: transparent;
    color: #1a1916;
  }
</style>

<section class="profile-section">

  <!-- LEFT: photo + name + info -->
  <div class="profile-left">
    <img src="docs/IMG_6368.jpg" class="profile-img" alt="Cristina Jackson"/>
    <h1 class="profile-name">Cristina<br>Jackson</h1>
    <div class="profile-meta">
      <div class="divider"></div>
      <span>Bachelor of Arts (BA) in Economics and Environmental Studies, University of California, Santa Barbara (Expected Graduation: June 2026)</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- RIGHT: bio + currently + links -->
  <div class="profile-right">

    <div>
      <p class="profile-eyebrow">About me</p>
      <p class="profile-bio">Hi. I'm Cristina. I am intersted in financial management, sustainable energy, and learning to code. I will be graduating this Spring. I enjoy sailing, running, and vibe-coding in my free time.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="currently-block">
      <p class="currently-heading">Currently</p>
      <div class="currently-item">
        <div class="c-dot"></div>
        <p class="c-text"><strong>Working on</strong> This website </p>
      </div>
      <div class="currently-item">
        <div class="c-dot"></div>
        <p class="c-text"><strong>Studying</strong> Financial Management, Environmental Law, and Personnel and Behavioral Economics. </p>
      </div>
      <div class="currently-item">
        <div class="c-dot"></div>
        <p class="c-text"><strong>Reading</strong> Little Fires Everywhere </p>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>
```
